title: Sample Grant-Funded Undergraduate Tuition, Fees, and Health Insurance Request Memo (PDF)
content: Sample completed version of the Grant-Funded Undergraduate Tuition, Fees, and Health Insurance Request Memo, hosted as a PDF on the Morgan State ORA Post-Award Forms page. Provided as a reference example to help PIs complete the live DocuSign undergraduate tuition memo (PowerFormId 6ed32147-6b47-4944-b24d-b9003ab95638) accurately. The sample is linked from the 'Tuition, Fees, and Health Insurance Request Forms' accordion on the Post-Award Forms page. Linked from the live page on 2026-05-14.
